prompt: Create a cinematic vertical full-body anime-realistic portrait of Emilia, a beautiful young woman at a Japanese Tanabata festival at night, standing on a narrow path lined with bamboo branches, warm fairy lights, and many hanging tanzaku wish papers. She has long blonde hair in a high side ponytail tied with a black ribbon, soft bangs, large pinkish eyes, pale skin, delicate makeup, and a slightly curious upward gaze. She is reaching up with her right arm to touch or hang one visible pink tanzaku strip with handwritten Japanese-style text, while her left arm hangs relaxed by her side. Dress her in a somewhat awkwardly worn deep red yukata with pale pink floral prints, loose short hem, wide sleeves, and a mustard yellow obi tied around the waist; show one decorative white-and-red thigh garter on her right thigh. The setting is an intimate bamboo-wish tunnel with exactly three prominent categories of repeated decorations: many green bamboo leaves overhead and along both sides, numerous small warm glowing bulbs forming golden bokeh, and multiple pastel tanzaku strips in pink, cream, yellow, and blue hanging vertically. Background includes a softly blurred urban night skyline with bridge or riverside lights, strong depth of field, warm amber lighting on the subject, dark blue night sky, realistic skin and fabric texture, high-detail gpt-image-2 style, shallow focus, 9:16 composition, slightly tilted dynamic camera angle, subject centered slightly lower than the raised hand, romantic festival atmosphere, no watermark, no extra people, no readable modern signage.
